hooks.command:
bash -c 'stale=$(git branch -vv 2>/dev/null | grep ": gone]" | sed "s/^[* ]*/  /" | cut -d" " -f3); orphans=$(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | grep -v "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)$" | sed "s/^/  /"); msg=""; if [ -n "$stale" ]; then msg="Stale branches (remote deleted):
$stale"; fi; if [ -n "$orphans" ]; then [ -n "$msg" ] && msg="$msg
"; msg="${msg}Active worktrees:
$orphans"; fi; if [ -n "$msg" ]; then echo -e "Git cleanup check:
$msg
Run gclean to remove stale branches."; fi'

bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "^git commit|&& git commit|; git commit"; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); for b in main master develop staging production; do if [ "$branch" = "$b" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot commit to protected branch '"'"'$branch'"'"'. Create a feature branch first."; exit 2; fi; done; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'filepath=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$filepath" | grep -qE "/.claude/agents/|/.claude/skills/|/config/skills/"; then S="$SECOND_BRAIN_HOME/repos/personal/macbook-dev-setup/scripts/sync-agentic.sh"; "$S" "$SECOND_BRAIN_HOME" --type workspace >/dev/null 2>&1; for d in "$SECOND_BRAIN_HOME/repos"/*/*/; do [ -d "$d/.claude" ] && "$S" "${d%/}" --type web >/dev/null 2>&1; done; echo "Synced agentic symlinks to all projects"; fi'
